extraInstructions: Look for ANY events tagged as burlesque, cabaret, or variety shows. Gallery5 typically runs a burlesque night on the 3rd Saturday of each month, but they also host one-off troupe productions (Afrotease, Nu Caldonia Rodeo, Immodest Opulence, RadQueer, Poppy la Fae, etc.). Extract real announced dates only — do not extrapolate the recurring pattern.

Burlesque Right Meow (BRM) produces multiple recurring series. Look for ticketed events on Ticketspice including: Pours and Pasties at Strangeways (Scott's Addition), Under The Veil at The Veil Brewing (Scott's Addition), Reveal Revue at Basic City, Baddies With Saddies / Dazzling Debuts / Nerdy Nights at Firehouse Theatre. For each event: capture venue, date, time, ticket URL. Also check https://www.scarletstarletrva.com/brmshows for the full BRM schedule.

18+ themed burlesque tribute series. Look for show titles, dates, times, and ticket links. Past examples: 'It's Britney B*tch Burlesque', 'Lip Sync Battle Burlesque', 'Liver Alone' (Scream tribute), 'Clothes/Off 2'.

Ellie Quinn Presents produces three recurring shows: (1) Nerdlesque brunch at Grandstaff & Stein (2113 E Main St) on the 1st Sunday monthly; (2) Burlesque Bingo at Basic City Beer Southside (212 W 6th St) on the 4th Friday monthly; (3) RVA Burlesque Bingo at Blue Bee Cider (4811 Bethlehem Rd). Pull dates as announced — do not extrapolate.

Look for burlesque, cabaret, or pasties-related events. Recurring shows include 'Orchard After Dark' and 'RVA Burlesque Bingo'. Also check https://www.visitrichmondva.com/event/?search=burlesque for any Blue Bee listings.
Firehouse hosts Burlesque Right Meow themed productions through Firehouse Fringe and similar programming. Look for any event titles containing burlesque, cabaret, variety, or BRM show names.
Under The Veil is a recurring in-the-round burlesque show by Burlesque Right Meow at Veil Brewing. Tickets via Ticketspice. Pull only announced dates.
Look for burlesque-related events including the Reveal Revue (by Burlesque Right Meow) and Burlesque Bingo (by Ellie Quinn). The bingo is the 4th Friday monthly but pull only announced dates.

New cabaret/burlesque/circus/drag venue in Shockoe Bottom that opened December 2025. Their Full Moon Fest series happens around each full moon. Instagram posts and stories typically list upcoming dates; also check https://www.dreamerfxstudios.com/ if linked.
Carytown cabaret venue that hosts Révéler Cabaret variety nights (jazz + burlesque + magic + drag) and occasional 'Boleros + Burlesque' benefit shows. Look for any burlesque-tagged events.
Queer-focused rental venue that hosts Pink Faerie Productions and other independent burlesque shows. Look for any burlesque/cabaret-tagged events.
Annual multi-day burlesque festival, currently slated for early November. Capture the festival dates, ticket links, and any satellite events at specific venues.
